description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument with a rectangular base and a vertical shaft, topped by a small sculpted figure. The front face features a prominent circular emblem and engraved text, likely commemorative or dedicatory in nature. The shaft is relatively slender and rises from a solid, tiered pedestal, which appears to be constructed from the same stone material. The obelisk's surfaces show signs of weathering, with some discoloration and patina, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time. The sculpted figure at the top adds a unique decorative element, distinguishing it from more austere obelisks. The monument is set on a paved or stone platform, with no visible barriers or additional structures immediately adjacent.
description: A weathered stone obelisk monument with a rectangular base, engraved front, and a small sculpted figure on top, set on a paved platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved circular emblem and text, with the sculpted figure clearly visible atop the obelisk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slender vertical shaft and the depth of the rectangular base, with inscriptions visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the obelisk and the shadow cast by the monument, with less visible detail on the shaft.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side profile of the obelisk and the sculpted figure, with inscriptions running vertically.
attribute_inscription: Engraved text and a circular emblem are visible on the front face, with additional vertical inscriptions on the sides. The text appears to be in a Latin alphabet, is moderately legible, and is carved in a serif style.
attribute_ornamentation: A small sculpted figure is present at the tip, and the front face features a circular emblem. No other decorative motifs or patterns are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and tiered, constructed from stone, with a slightly projecting plinth and a smooth, weathered finish. No steps or additional platforms are visible.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is adorned with a small sculpted figure, possibly metallic, standing atop the shaft. The finish is rough and weathered, matching the rest of the monument.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a paved or stone platform, with no visible fences, vegetation, or additional objects immediately surrounding it.
